name: Ridgepost Capital, Inc.
business: Ridgepost Capital, Inc. is a multi-asset class private market solutions provider that structures, manages, and monitors portfolios of private market investments, including primary investment funds, secondary investments, direct investments, and co-investments. The company offers solutions in Private Equity, Venture Capital, and Private Credit to institutional investors and high-net-worth individuals. Revenue is composed almost entirely of recurring management and advisory fees on committed capital.

exposures.sentence: Our existing portfolio of private solutions includes Private Equity, Venture Capital, and Private Credit.
Our existing portfolio of private solutions includes Private Equity, Venture Capital, and Private Credit.
Our existing portfolio of private solutions includes Private Equity, Venture Capital, and Private Credit.

Within PCS, the Company makes investments that support historic building renovation, brownfield site remediation, and renewable energy projects, as well as provide capital to small businesses in underserved communities.
Investments in clean energy have generated an estimate of about 4,000 GWh of renewable energy from inception to December 31, 2025.

catalysts.sentence: On April 4, 2025, the Company completed the acquisition of Qualitas.

catalysts.event: Conversion of Bonaccord strategic alliance to equity
catalysts.sentence: On April 1, 2025, the investor converted their portion of Bonaccord's net management fee earnings into an equity interest in Bonaccord.

catalysts.event: Company name change to Ridgepost Capital, Inc.
catalysts.sentence: On February 11, 2026, the Company's name changed from P10, Inc. to Ridgepost Capital, Inc.

catalysts.event: Agreement to acquire Stellus Capital Management
catalysts.sentence: on February 5, 2026, we entered into an agreement to acquire Stellus Capital Management, LLC ("Stellus").
We expect the Stellus acquisition to close in mid-2026, subject to customary closing conditions and regulatory approvals.
